revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''4-2-420

A conductor or group of conductors placed above the ground, used in association with an antenna system instead of, or supplementary to, an earth system.

Reference: B.S.
